title: FISH - 211info
text: FISH OF EUGENE FISH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides prepared food boxes, prescription assistance, propane assistance, and hygiene items. Prescription payments are made directly to the dispensing pharmacy. Households can receive a food box and hygiene items once per month and fill a 5-gallon tank once every two months. Prescriptions are one-time for most medications, up to $100. 440 Maxwell Road Eugene, OR 97404 Eligibility: Food boxes, hygiene items and propane: Unrestricted Prescription assistance: Must have a prescription from a doctor Hours: Food: Tuesday/Thursday 10:30am-1:30pm to arrange food box; Pickup food box 2pm-3pm on requested day Propane and prescription assistance: Tuesday/Wednesday/Thursday 10:30am-1:30pm Closed holidays (541) 689-9750 Get Directions Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 689-9750 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Prescription assistance: Proof of prescription All other services: None AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Food Pantries Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Personal/Grooming Supplies Prescription Expense Assistance If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FISH OF EUGENE
